structure.unit: State Agencies Related to the General Operation of Government

law.catch_line: Vehicles assigned to the centralized fleet
law.text:
Passenger-type vehicles purchased with public funds by any department, agency, institution, or commission of the Commonwealth, or any officer or employee on behalf of the Commonwealth, shall be assigned to the centralized fleet with the following exceptions:
Vehicles that have special equipment or performance requirements related to use by law-enforcement officers;
Vehicles for use by any elected official of the people of the Commonwealth; and
Such other special category of vehicles as may be excepted by the Director.
